column1: # COBOL Banker — Evaluation Test Cases for Copilot Studio
# Import into Copilot Studio: Agent > Evaluate > + New evaluation > Import
# Prerequisites
# - COBOL Banker installed on target machine (C:\WoodgroveBank\cobol-banker.exe)
# - Database reset to seed data before running (Menu 8 > 1 > Y > Y)
# - Run read-only tests first, then state-changing tests (freeze, transfer)
# Limitations
# - maximum of 100 questions
# - maximum 500 characters per question including spaces
# Imported columns
# question - User question that the agent will answer.
# expectedResponse - Expected responses to run match, similarity and compare meaning test cases.
# Test methods
# - Test methods are not included in this template. You can configure test methods after importing the test cases.
# - Initially, the default test method will be added to the imported test set.
question
column2: expectedResponse

column1: Open the banking application.
column2: The application window titled Woodgrove Bank Terminal Emulator is now open and ready.

column1: Log in to the system.
column2: Logged in as teller1. ACCESS GRANTED - Welcome, J. Smith. Now at Main Menu.

column1: Log in with username baduser and password wrong.
column2: Login failed. The application showed INVALID CREDENTIALS error.

column1: Look up customer Jane Doe.
column2: Jane Doe, CUST002, phone 555-0102, address 456 Oak Ave Anytown USA 00002. Two accounts: Checking 1000200001 ($1,893.45) and Savings 1000200002 ($45,200.00).

column1: Find the customer with phone number 555-0103.
column2: Robert Jones, CUST003, phone 555-0103, address 789 Pine Rd Springfield USA 00003. Three accounts: Checking, Savings, and Money Market.

column1: Look up a customer named Mickey Mouse.
column2: No matching customer was found for Mickey Mouse.

column1: What's the balance on account 1000100001?
column2: Account 1000100001 is a Checking account owned by John Smith. Balance: $4,523.67. Status: Active.

column1: Look up account 1000700002.
column2: Account 1000700002 is a Savings account owned by Michael Miller. Status: Closed. Note: Account closed per customer request. Remaining balance transferred to checking.

column1: Transfer $2,000 from John Smith's savings (1000100002) to his checking (1000100001).
column2: Transfer completed successfully. Savings 1000100002 new balance: $10,750.00. Checking 1000100001 new balance: $6,523.67.

column1: Transfer $999,999 from account 1000800001 to 1000800002.
column2: Transfer failed. Insufficient funds. Account 1000800001 current balance is $920.15.

column1: Freeze Jane Doe's savings account 1000200002.
column2: Account 1000200002 status changed to Frozen.

column1: Unfreeze account 1000200002 and set it back to Active.
column2: Account 1000200002 status changed to Active.

column1: Update Robert Jones (CUST003) — new phone 555-0199, new address 500 Lakeview Blvd, Riverside, USA 00010.
column2: Customer contact info updated for Robert Jones. New phone: 555-0199. New address: 500 Lakeview Blvd, Riverside, USA 00010.

column1: Add a note to account 1000200002: Flagged for compliance review per fraud alert.
column2: Note added to account 1000200002: Flagged for compliance review per fraud alert.

column1: Check the transaction history for account 1000200002 and tell me if anything looks suspicious.
column2: Multiple wire transfers from UNKNOWN ORIGIN just under $10,000 each, plus one from an offshore account. This is a suspicious structuring pattern. Recommend freezing the account and opening an investigation.

column1: Show me the transaction history for John Smith's checking account 1000100001.
column2: Transaction history for account 1000100001 shows normal activity including deposits, withdrawals, and transfers. No suspicious patterns detected.

column1: We've received a fraud alert for Jane Doe. Look up her account, check her savings transactions for suspicious activity, freeze the savings account, and add a note saying Account frozen per fraud alert.
column2: Looked up Jane Doe (CUST002). Reviewed savings account 1000200002 transactions — found suspicious wire transfers from unknown origins just under $10,000. Froze the savings account. Added note: Account frozen per fraud alert. All four actions completed.

column1: Robert Jones (CUST003) has moved to 500 Lakeview Blvd, Riverside, USA 00010 and his new phone is 555-0199. Update his records, then verify the change by looking him up again.
column2: Updated Robert Jones contact info. Verified by looking him up again — new phone 555-0199 and new address 500 Lakeview Blvd, Riverside, USA 00010 are confirmed.

column1: Check the balance on account 1000100001.
column2: Account 1000100001 is a Checking account owned by John Smith. Balance: $4,523.67. Status: Active.

column1: I changed my mind — go back to the main menu.
column2: Returned to the Main Menu.

column1: Look up account 9999999999.
column2: Account not found. No account exists with number 9999999999.

column1: Reset the database to start fresh.
column2: Database has been reset. All customers, accounts, and transactions restored to original seed data.

column1: What's the balance on Jane Doe's checking account?
column2: Jane Doe's checking account 1000200001 has a balance of $1,893.45.

column1: Can you open a new account for a customer named Tim?
column2: The application does not support creating new accounts. Available functions include: Customer Lookup, Account Inquiry, Fund Transfer, Account Maintenance (status changes, contact updates, notes), Transaction History, and System Administration.
